issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: secure-rest-api-with-kv
scenarios.rationale: Response A uses Deno.serve and explicit permissions via deno.json, but still lacks kv.atomic and TTL; Response B uses Oak and runtime permission requests, missing Deno.serve and TTL.

scenarios.name: cross-platform-cli-compile
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits @std/cli, proper permissions, coverage, and cross-platform compilation.
